summary: Tested enhanced Supplier Health Dashboard UI with sidebar+detail layout. All features working: supplier selector/filter, search filtering, status filtering, issue expansion with product tables, and Manage Products navigation. Backend API (14/14 tests passed). Frontend UI fully functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Health Dashboard at /admin/supplier-health has new sidebar+detail layout. Left sidebar shows all suppliers with health scores, search box, and status filter. Right panel shows detailed health report when supplier is selected. Issue sections expand to show product tables with #, Code, Product Name columns.

backend_apis: ✓ Response has timestamp, summary, and suppliers array
✓ Summary includes: total_suppliers, total_products, total_issues, average_score, healthy, warning, critical, null_supplier_products
✓ Each supplier has: supplier, total_products, health_score, status, issue_counts, total_issues, issues
frontend_ui: ✓ Summary cards display: Avg Score (2), Suppliers (10), Healthy (0), Warning (0), Critical (10)
✓ Left sidebar shows all 10 suppliers with health scores and issue counts
✓ Search box filters suppliers by name (tested 'Thermo' -> 1 result)
✓ Clicking supplier card shows detailed health report in right panel
✓ Selected supplier shows health score ring, status badge, product count, and 'Manage Products' button
✓ Issues listed by type with counts and percentage bars
✓ Clicking issue section expands to show product table with #, Code, Product Name columns
✓ Status filter works - clicking Critical summary card filters sidebar
✓ Clear filter button appears when status filter is active
✓ Orphaned Products warning shows 322 products with no supplier
